data.body:
## Description

Update plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md to rename tests_run → hypothesis_tests with updated sub-fields in ALL locations:

### Changes
1. Investigation RESULT Report Schema section (~line 465): rename tests_run: → hypothesis_tests:, rename sub-fields command → test, result → verdict, add observed: <what actually happened> field between test and verdict
2. Field reference table (~line 503): rename tests_run row to hypothesis_tests, update description to reference new sub-field names
3. Discovery File Protocol required-fields list (~line 503): rename tests_run bullet to hypothesis_tests
4. All prose references throughout SKILL.md: update 'Record each empirical test in the tests_run section' → 'hypothesis_tests section', update 'hypothesis test results' context to use new field names, etc.
5. Update RED markers in .test-index — remove markers for SKILL.md-specific tests that now pass

### Note
Discovery files at /tmp/fix-bug-discovery-*.json are ephemeral per-run artifacts; any in-flight files from prior sessions using old field names are safe to ignore.

### TDD
Tests from Task 1 (5f26-013c) that check SKILL.md fields go from RED → GREEN after this task.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — SKILL.md tests now GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] SKILL.md contains hypothesis_tests in RESULT schema
  Verify: grep -q 'hypothesis_tests:' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md does not contain old tests_run field name (no transitional annotations)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'tests_run' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
